ticket.subject: Reservation not found at check-in
ticket.description: Synthetic ticket for deterministic matrix QA test: Reservation not found at check-in

rule.key: Ticket | Reservation not found at check-in
rule.issue_normalized: reservation not found at check in
required_actions: Call Supplier, 2. If unconfirmed by the Supplier in 20 minutes, 3. Create a Voucher and Rebook (if current hotel has inventory) or Relocate by Booking at a near by hotel. ** Do your best to upgrade the client's room type  to use full voucher value for their new reservation** The exception would be in they are lowering the number of nights they will expect a refund of the unused night(s). If there are any unused funds; Process a refund via the queue for the client and advise of the refund timeline (2-7 business days).

Call the hotel and obtain FOC, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property.

If the guest declines support and requests a refund; then call the hotel and obtain FOC, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property.
Process a refund via the queue for the client and advise of the refund timeline (2-7 business days).
rule.matrix_instructions: 1. Call Supplier, 2. If unconfirmed by the Supplier in 20 minutes, 3. Create a Voucher and Rebook (if current hotel has inventory) or Relocate by Booking at a near by hotel. ** Do your best to upgrade the client's room type  to use full voucher value for their new reservation** The exception would be in they are lowering the number of nights they will expect a refund of the unused night(s). If there are any unused funds; Process a refund via the queue for the client and advise of the refund timeline (2-7 business days). 5. Call the hotel and obtain FOC, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property. 5. If the guest declines support and requests a refund; then call the hotel and obtain FOC, note the booking accurately with the hotel staff member's name, (if possible) the cancellation number, and the email address for the hotel manager or front desk. If you do not obtain FOC, take down hotel staff member's name and email address for the property. 6. Process a refund via the queue for the client and advise of the refund timeline (2-7 business days).

routing_rules.slack: YES - Only for same day check in's. NO SLACK FOR FUTURE DATES.
routing_rules.refund_queue: YES - for a voucher if rebooking

compliance_checks: Issue must map to a strict matrix rule before automation; otherwise escalate to human supervisor.
Document every call/outreach attempt and staff name/email/cancellation or confirmation number when available.
FOC must be requested and documented before refunding where required.
Refund queue must be used exactly when matrix requires it; advise approved refund timeline only when allowed.
Slack/channel escalation must follow matrix limits, including same-day restrictions where stated.
Supervisor/VIPRES escalation required before final automated closure.

draft: Hello, thank you for contacting HotelPlanner. We reviewed your request regarding Reservation not found at check-in. This ticket requires a supervisor review before final resolution. Our team will follow the required process and document the outcome on your reservation.
